subject: Tapion partially obscured by or overlaid with a large skull motif, representing the hidden darkness of the demon sealed within him
suspected_ip: Tapion (Dragon Ball Z: Wrath of the Dragon)
description: A striking composition in which a large skull or death-head image dominates the foreground or is overlaid on a humanoid figure. Behind or within the skull imagery, a figure with spiky hair is visible — partially obscured, suggesting the duality of a warrior who carries a monstrous entity within. The palette shifts dramatically toward dark purples, greys, and blacks, with the skull rendered in pale tones against a darker background. This card art visualizes the horror of Tapion's curse: the demon Hirudegarn sealed within his body. At 624×871 resolution, the layers of skull-and-figure composition are clearly legible even if edge details are soft.
foreground: large skull or death-head motif overlaid on humanoid figure with spiky hair
emotion: dread, hidden menace, the weight of a monstrous burden
